name: Microsoft Teams Downstream Profile Example
description: Example delegated-auth tool that calls a downstream profile API with the signed-in Teams user's token.

downstreamBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the downstream API that validates the Teams SSO token and performs OBO to Graph.

audience.description: Expected JWT audience for the downstream API. For Entra app-id URI tokens, api://<downstream-app-id> is accepted as equivalent to the bare downstream app id.

scope.description: Expected delegated scope claim in the downstream API token.

profilePath.description: Relative downstream API path that returns the signed-in user's profile.
